title: gyptis tanacetifolia
intro: Gyptis tanacetifolia, also known as Tansy, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Gyptis tanacetifolia has been used to alleviate digestive problems, such as bloating and gas, as well as to reduce fever and relieve menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil for various herbal remedies, including treating anxiety and promoting relaxation.
